title: Senegal at the 2026 World Cup: roster, list, players, group and schedule
original_text: Senegal are, without doubt, one of the African powerhouses at the 2026 World Cup. Players of the caliber of Sadio Mané, Pape Gueye and Nicolas Jackson bring star quality to a squad coached by Pape Thiaw. On the field, they are also the reigning African champions, pending the resolution of the controversial final that, according to the Confederation of African Football, was won by Morocco. Pape Thiaw The Teranga Lions’ presence alongside Norway and France in Group I makes it one of the most competitive and demanding groups at this World Cup. Senegal will kick off their campaign against France in one of the standout matches of the opening round. Get closer to the game!
